allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); bp = data['breakpoints']; [print\(f'{k}: {v[\\"value\\"]}'\) for k,v in sorted\(bp.items\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); spacing = data['spacing']; [print\(f'{k}: {v[\\"value\\"]}'\) for k,v in sorted\(spacing.items\(\)\) if not k.startswith\('space'\) and not k.startswith\('padding'\) and not k.startswith\('section'\) and not k.startswith\('tray'\) and not k.startswith\('modal'\) and not k.startswith\('module'\) and not k.startswith\('select'\) and not k.startswith\('checkbox'\) and not k.startswith\('radio'\) and not k.startswith\('toggle'\) and not k.startswith\('button'\) and not k.startswith\('tag'\) and not k.startswith\('status'\) and not k.startswith\('dataPoint'\) and not k.startswith\('input'\) and not k.startswith\('text'\)]")

Bash(node -e "const theme = require\('/Users/tom.murphy/VibeCoding/instui-sandbox/node_modules/@instructure/ui-themes'\); console.log\('Has colors.backgroundBrand:', 'backgroundBrand' in theme.canvas.colors\); console.log\('Colors object keys:', Object.keys\(theme.canvas.colors\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const theme = require\('/Users/tom.murphy/VibeCoding/instui-sandbox/node_modules/@instructure/ui-themes'\); const st = theme.light.newTheme.sharedTokens; console.log\('light sharedTokens keys:', Object.keys\(st || {}\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const theme = require\('/Users/tom.murphy/VibeCoding/instui-sandbox/node_modules/@instructure/ui-themes'\); const sem = theme.light.newTheme.semantics; console.log\('light semantics keys:', Object.keys\(sem || {}\)\); console.log\('light semantics.color:', Object.keys\(sem?.color || {}\)\)")

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then ESLINT_OUT=$(cd /Users/tom.murphy/VibeCoding/instui-sandbox && npx eslint "$FILE" --max-warnings 0 2>&1); STATUS=$?; if [ $STATUS -ne 0 ]; then echo "$ESLINT_OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/Users/tom.murphy/VibeCoding/instui-sandbox/src'; then TSC_OUT=$(cd /Users/tom.murphy/VibeCoding/instui-sandbox && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit 2>&1); STATUS=$?; if [ $STATUS -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors:\n$TSC_OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.tsx$'; then if grep -qE '>\s*[A-Z][a-z].{10,}' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "UX copy detected in $FILE. Invoke the uxcopy-check skill on any new human-visible strings before proceeding."; fi; fi
